Project

Astro Portfolio Site

A lightweight portfolio and content site built for fast loading, simple maintenance, and clean component reuse.

Published Feb 20, 2026

AstroTypeScriptCSSNginx
GitHub Live Demo

The site uses Astro for static-first delivery and a small set of reusable components. It is designed to scale from a simple personal homepage to a more structured showcase with project detail pages.

Built with Astro. Adapt this template for your own portfolio or project showcase.
